name: Chocolate Chip Treasure Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix graham cracker crumbs, flour, and baking powder in a bowl.
2. In a large mixing bowl, beat the sweetened condensed milk and butter until smooth.
3. Add the dry mixture to the wet ingredients and mix well.
4. Stir in the coconut, chocolate chips, and walnuts.
5. Drop rounded tablespoons of dough onto ungreased cookie sheets.
6. Bake at 375°F for 9-10 minutes or until lightly browned.
7. Store loosely covered at room temperature.
